# extends-mixin-cmp



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

A component that uses the Mixin() helper with multiple mixin factory functions.
Tests that decorated members from multiple mixin factories are properly merged
and have reactivity.

## Properties

| Property     | Attribute     | Description | Type     | Default                    |
| ------------ | ------------- | ----------- | -------- | -------------------------- |
| `getterProp` | `getter-prop` |             | `string` | `'getter default value'`   |
| `prop1`      | `prop-1`      |             | `string` | `'default text'`           |
| `prop2`      | `prop-2`      |             | `string` | `'ExtendedCmp prop2 text'` |
| `prop3`      | `prop-3`      |             | `string` | `'mixin b text'`           |
